description.value:
To use this technique, you must have Speed Rank 2 or higher active. You make a charge attack against the target, but you must move at least 20 ft. before making the attack. Taking advantage of the friction from your high-speed movement and channeling your Raiton nature based on the Denjiba Reiki aura, you accumulate a dense charge of static electricity.

If the attack hits, it deals normal damage plus an additional 1d6 bonus electric damage per 2 levels (up to 5d6). In addition, the violent static discharge upon impact forces the target to succeed on a Fortitude save or become @Condition[stunned;duration=1]{stunned} for 1 round. This technique can be used once per encounter.

If the target is soaked in water or wearing a large amount of metal (such as metallic armor or heavy shields), it suffers a -2 penalty to the Fortitude save.

Requires: Denjiba Reiki no Jutsu (t)

Mastery: The first, third and fifth step increase the number of uses per encounter by one each.

At the third step of mastery, this technique can be performed as an attack action. When used this way, you do not have to move in a straight line, but must use all of your movement for the turn before making the attack.
